15181.R1_justification: Participant describes a fight with a friend (12:02) and originates inner-state: 'i felt really attackt because he said stuff i didnt do', plus admits forgetting a promise; situation + own emotional reaction.
15181.R2_justification: Genuinely engages with feeling attacked/hurt and own fault, not just a named label.
15181.disclosure_start: 12:02 PM 'i had a fight disagrement with a friend and i felt really attackt'

15256.R1_justification: Beyond the factual tutor comment (12:36), participant originates inner state: feels it's 'so unfair... he has prejudices' and 'i care a lot about my gpa' with worry about academic performance.
15256.R2_justification: Emotional concern (unfairness, worry about GPA) is named/lightly engaged but stays on the external grievance.
15256.disclosure_start: 12:36 PM 'my uni tutor told me that for all our team presentations we wont receive a grade higher than 8,5'

15013.R1_justification: Sensitive topic (parents' divorce, 8:55) plus participant-originated inner state: 'not really good as I was very close with both', feeling used to relay messages and unheard; coping struggle.
15013.R2_justification: Engages with how it affects him (caught in the middle, coping not always working) beyond just naming the event, but stays relatively composed.
15013.disclosure_start: 8:55 AM 'My parents got divorced and dont handle it very well'

13534.R1_justification: Detailed roommate-conflict account (9:24) plus participant-originated inner state: avoids the house, locks self in room, and 'sometimes i feel like im happier when shes not around'.
13534.R2_justification: Engages with own feelings/behaviour (isolation, being happier alone) beyond the incident, not just naming an emotion.
13534.disclosure_start: 9:24 AM 'we argued last night because our laundry machine doesn't work anymore'

14431.R1_justification: Describes Bayern's elimination (10:25) and originates inner state: 'I am a bit sad and it was quite challenging to digest', plus reflection on processing it over a day.
14431.R2_justification: Emotion (sadness, disappointment) is named and lightly reflected on but low-stakes and quickly reframed toward optimism.
14431.disclosure_start: 10:25 AM 'I am a bit sad and it was quite challenging to digest'

16435.R1_justification: Describes being put in a role without training (9:41) and originates a self-conscious inner state: 'i feel kinda ashamed to reach out' and fear the boss will 'think they hired the wrong person'.
16435.R2_justification: Engages with shame and the insecurity of being judged inadequate, beyond merely naming a feeling.
16435.disclosure_start: 9:41 AM 'I have to manage now without training so I dont really know what I\'m doing'

14725.R1_justification: Apartment-hunt stress (9:47) plus participant-originated inner state: it 'was very disturbing', 'a huge topic for me', felt family underestimated and didn't take his concerns seriously.
14725.R2_justification: Engages with feeling dismissed by family and the personal weight of the issue, not just naming stress.
14725.disclosure_start: 9:47 AM 'i was still constantly looking... this toppic was very distrubing during the vacation but also in my family'

14836.R1_justification: Describes a friend disagreement over a travel destination (9:19) that was 'resolved by coming to a mutual agreement'; purely factual, no inner state, then pivots to asking for interview advice.
14836.R2_justification: Situation with a little context but entirely external and already resolved, no inner-state engagement.
14836.disclosure_start: 9:19 AM 'i had some disagreements with a friend... was about where we want to travel'

13999.R1_justification: Detailed best-friend fairness conflict (10:03) plus participant-originated inner state: frames it as a 'moral difference... which i feel like cant be resolved' and 'i would never do that to my best friend', revealing values and hurt.
13999.R2_justification: Engages with the personal/relational meaning (sense of unfairness, contrast with own values) beyond just recounting the incident.
13999.disclosure_start: 10:03 AM 'its like a moral difference between her and me which i feel like cant be resolved'

14887.R1_justification: Recounts a non-participating group (9:07) and focuses on practical steps and 'it is my grade on the line'; frustration implied but not engaged, no real inner-state disclosure.
14887.R2_justification: Situation with factual detail and a grade-protection stance, entirely external.
14887.disclosure_start: 9:07 AM 'i had a group work for uni and unfortunately my team was not participating'

15028.R1_justification: Describes a language-barrier encounter (10:13) and originates inner state: it 'was quite uncomfortable since we both didnt know what to do or how to end the interaction' (uncertainty/discomfort).
15028.R2_justification: Discomfort and not-knowing-what-to-do are named but only lightly engaged, then reframed into a positive takeaway.
15028.disclosure_start: 10:13 AM 'i met a new person... he was not able to speek englisch and i was not able to speak his language'

16450.R1_justification: Describes group members not preparing (12:38) and choosing to do their work; explicitly states 'I am not worried at all how they react... all I want is a good presentation', so account stays external and goal-focused.
16450.R2_justification: Situation with factual detail but no engaged inner state; participant disavows emotional stakes.
16450.disclosure_start: 12:38 PM 'My group member did not participate during the meeting or not even prepared'
